units.name: collect_requirements
units.instructions: Resolve missing specification details. Use [REQUIREMENTS_READY] when requirements are clear, [ASK_USER] for clarification, [CONTINUE] to keep refining, [DONE] if the goal is already complete, [FAIL] if you cannot proceed.

units.name: produce_tasks
units.instructions: Turn requirements into a concrete ordered task list. Use [DONE] when the list is ready, [CONTINUE] to keep refining, [ASK_USER] for clarification, [FAIL] if you cannot proceed.
